title: The Crafter's Workshop
excerpt: Hello there. Thanks for all the wonderful comments lately - love how so many people enjoyed and shared their thoughts on the Instagram post! I had the pleasure of working with The Crafter's Workshop templates for The Scrap Review .…
body:
Hello there. Thanks for all the wonderful comments lately - love how so many people enjoyed and shared their thoughts on the Instagram post!

I had the pleasure of working with The Crafter's Workshop templates for The Scrap Review.

Just a reminder that today is the last day to receive a free digital download if you register for my online workshop, Collect & Create. There are instructional videos along with a downloadable workbook full of step-by-step photos. You can access is at anytime and work at your own pace.

Here are some things people are saying about the workshop: 

  • Amy, i've always loved your style, so i was eager to sign up for your class. i love, LOVE watching people create, and finding out how they think about their art. so i'm just loving this class so far.

  • I promised myself I wouldn't sign up for anymore online classes until I'd finished a few, but this looked too good to resist... even though I know it will still be here later. I went through the first chapter and video and just love it so far! I can't wait to get to work this weekend.

  • I gave myself this class as an Easter present - It was a good decision!
    I love your class, Amy! Already watched every video, read all the pdf files. Everything is great!!! There's a LOT of inspiration.
